kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Beatrix, Tanner, Duke, and 6 coins belong to different artisans.
Between Edmund and Blacksmith, one goes with Rope and the other with 10 coins.
The Potter's levy is at most 4 coins away from the artisan serving the Duke.
Exactly one of these is true: Rowan goes with Candles; Highrow goes with Sheriff; Oldwall goes with 10 coins.
Millpond goes with exactly one of Edmund, Fletcher, or Duke.
Either Tanner goes with Rowan or someone in the River Ward goes with Blacksmith (but not both).
Fletcher goes with at least two of Godfrey, Candles, Oldwall, and Prince.
The artisan serving the Sheriff's levy is exactly 4 coins more than Rowan.
10 coins goes with exactly two of Edmund, Barrels, and Sheriff.
The artisan who makes Horseshoes' levy is between Rowan and the Tanner.
